payload.text:
How this bot works

Teachers upload a CSV of student logins and passwords. The bot matches each identifier to a Telegram user who has started the bot, then sends credentials in a private message.

Students: tap /start, then Link email if your school matches by email.
Admins: use Upload CSV, Last job, and Failure report from the menu.

CSV format (header required):
identifier,password
@username,secret
student@school.edu,secret

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
